faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Bethpage?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Bethpage typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method selected. We offer free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees, and can customize a treatment plan that fits your budget while ensuring complete elimination.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat my Bethpage home for bed bugs?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Bethpage and Long Island for urgent bed bug situations. Most treatments can be scheduled within 24-48 hours of your initial call, and our heat treatments can eliminate bed bugs in a single day, while chemical treatments may require follow-up visits spaced 2-3 weeks apart.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Bethpage?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and EPA-approved chemical treatments for Bethpage properties. Heat treatment uses specialized equipment to raise room temperatures to 120-135°F, killing bed bugs and eggs in all life stages in one session. Chemical treatments involve targeted application of safe, effective pesticides and typically require 2-3 treatments for complete eradication. Our technicians will recommend the best approach based on your specific situation.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatments in Bethpage?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments in Bethpage come with a comprehensive warranty. We offer a 30-day guarantee on heat treatments and a 60-90 day warranty on chemical treatment programs. If bed bugs return during the warranty period, we'll re-treat your property at no additional charge. Our goal is complete elimination and your total peace of mind.
